description: DRACOON provides enterprise file sharing and secure data room services, including upload/download shares, user and group management, and storage-related administration. Its platform supports integrations for accessing files, managing tenants and users, and configuring system features.
summary: DRACOON exposes a JSON/REST HTTP API documented via an OpenAPI-described spec page and uses OAuth 2.0 for authenticated API access; the spec also documents public unauthenticated share/download operations.
